name: Gwalior Fort
description: The historic heart and highest point of the city.

name: Lashkar
description: The traditional central business district and palace area.

name: Gole Ka Mandir
description: A major transit hub connecting to the northern outskirts.

name: Hazira
description: An industrial and densely populated residential zone.

name: Morar
description: Formerly a separate cantonment, now a bustling eastern wing.

name: City Centre
description: The modern administrative and upscale commercial hub.

name: Thatipur
description: A prominent residential government colony area.

name: Phool Bagh
description: A central cultural area housing parks, museums, and shrines.

name: Dabra (Outskirts)
description: The southern gateway and industrial satellite region.

name: DD Nagar
description: A planned residential township towards the northeast.

name: Sada (New Gwalior)
description: The counter-magnet city area being developed to the west.

name: Kampoo
description: A historic southern area known for hospitals and sports.

name: Birla Nagar
description: An industrial belt centered around the railway station.

name: Tansen Nagar
description: A residential area named after the legendary musician.

name: Hurawali
description: A fast-developing residential zone on the eastern edge.
